texto: They (penguins) then fall madly in love and live happily ever after.-And so you ask yourself: "If a penguin can have a worthwhile, stimulating relationship, why the hell can't I?"-Or maybe you ask yourself: "Would I be happier if I started dating a penguin
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Bradley Trevor Greive que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “They (penguins) then fall madly in love and live happily ever after.-And so you ask yourself: "If…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, humor, relationships, com foco em relationships.
